CustomField.description: Name of the Northstar Action Plan template that generated this Task. Distinct from the Activity.TaskAPTask__c lookup added by ActionPlansV4 — TaskAPTask__c points to the AP-side task record; this field captures the human-readable template name so reports don't need to join.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Which Action Plan template generated this Task. Auto-stamped.
CustomField.label: Action Plan Source
